title: Questionnaire
q1: What difficulties have you encountered during the rental process?
q2: How clear was your rental contract?
q3: Did you need help to understand or manage your contract?
q4: Have you ever needed to modify a clause in your contract?
q4a: How easy was it to request or obtain the modification?
q5: How much control do you feel you have over your registered contract information?
q6: Have you had difficulties communicating with your landlord about the contract?
q7: How long does it usually take to modify or finalize a contract?
q8: How much safer would you feel if you could view your registered contract online in a language you understand?
q9: Would you find it useful to see general feedback about a landlord’s reliability?
q10: Would you use a feature that allows you to leave feedback about your landlord?
q11: What would most improve your experience as a tenant when managing your rental contract?
l1: How did you prepare your last rental contract?
l1a: Why did you choose this method?
l2: What are the main difficulties when renting to foreign tenants?
l3: Are you familiar with the official RLI system of Agenzia delle Entrate?
l3a: What is the most frustrating part of the process?
l3b: How much time or money does it cost you to register a contract?
l4: How useful would a shared online contract be (auto-filled IDs, translations, real-time review)?
l4a: What should the tenant be allowed to edit?
l4b: Which collaboration mode do you prefer?
l5: Would you use a system that automatically registers the contract after e-signature?
l5a: What information must be shown for you to trust the calculation?
l6: What would help you feel safe while drafting a contract online?
l7: If you could add one dream feature to the official rental website, what would it be?
l8: Would you be comfortable with a mutual review system (landlord ↔ tenant)?
